_comment: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE — generated without live network access to portaldrazeb.cz. Field names (id, number, item.okres, detailUrl, auctionStart, status) mirror the accessors in normalizeAuctions() in ../../drazby/fetch.ts. THESE FIELD NAMES AND THE ENDPOINT MUST BE RECONCILED AGAINST THE LIVE portál dražeb response at deploy time (see Task 7 Step 1). Do not treat this shape as authoritative until verified against a recorded live XHR body.
